goal: Compare learning rate schedules (constant lr=0.01, cosine annealing, step decay factor=0.1 every 2 epochs) on CIFAR-10 with SimpleCNN. 5 epochs, 2000 training samples, 5 seeds (42,123,456,789,1024). Measure final test accuracy. Use SGD with momentum=0.9. DO NOT use more than 2000 training samples or more than 5 epochs.
